plains.summary: A flat, grassy biome with rolling hills and few trees. Ideal for large, open-concept builds and farming.

forest.summary: A common biome with many oak and birch trees. Excellent for wood resources.

swamp.summary: A flat, wet biome with shallow pools, vines, and dark-colored water. Slimes and witches spawn here.
features: Ideal for stilt houses or witch huts

desert.summary: A barren biome of sand dunes, cacti, and dead bushes. Features unique structures like pyramids and wells.
features: Good source of sand and sandstone
Ideal for pyramids or adobe-style homes

taiga.summary: A cool forest of spruce trees, ferns, and berry bushes. Often has wolves and foxes.
features: Good for log cabins or rustic builds
